category_sources: source_facts.description says gitg is a GNOME GUI client to view git repositories; official GNOME wiki says the same.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official GNOME wiki identify the project as gitg.
docs_sources: Official GNOME wiki page is the available documentation surface and links to development resources.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GNOME wiki Development Resources lists the Git clone URL as https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/gitg.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GNOME wiki describe gitg as a GNOME graphical Git repository viewer.
